capability_reports.name: repo_indexing_pipeline
capability_reports.title: Repository indexing pipeline
capability_reports.description: Repo traversal, document extraction, and index-write flow for search.
query_hints: repository scan crawl index writer segments
capability_reports.why_useful_here: High-quality indexing controls both retrieval quality and evidence trust for capability cards.

capability_reports.name: semantic_retrieval_stack
capability_reports.title: Semantic retrieval stack
capability_reports.description: Embeddings, vector similarity retrieval, and ranking logic.
query_hints: nearest neighbors cosine hnsw top k
capability_reports.why_useful_here: Semantic retrieval is the core upgrade path for better capability matching versus lexical-only search.

capability_reports.name: structured_filtering
capability_reports.title: Structured filtering and query parsing
capability_reports.description: Query parsing plus metadata or field-level filtering for constrained results.
capability_reports.why_useful_here: Capability search needs reliable constraints (language, license, framework) to keep candidate sets actionable.

capability_reports.name: cli_tooling_surface
capability_reports.title: Tool-use CLI surface
capability_reports.description: Command-line interfaces that expose ingest/search/eval workflows through explicit commands.
capability_reports.why_useful_here: A clear CLI surface makes this project easier to automate in agent loops and benchmark workflows.

capability_reports.name: agentic_workflows
capability_reports.title: Agent and workflow orchestration
capability_reports.description: Patterns for planner/executor style loops and tool-orchestrated retrieval workflows.
query_hints: agent planner executor tool calls workflow
capability_reports.why_useful_here: Agentic orchestration is needed to run iterative discovery and synthesis loops over capability evidence.
